creator: thierry@FreeBSD.org
text:
You're right, and upstream knows the situation (same thing on many Linux distros).
They are working on gdl-v1.0.0, which will depend on Python 3.x.

v1.0.0-rc.3 has been out since June 19, but there remains some caveats:
https://github.com/gnudatalanguage/gdl/issues
